# fullSizeImage

**Instance Property**

The unedited still photo content of the Live Photo.

## Declaration

```swift
var fullSizeImage: CIImage { get }
```

## Discussion

Use this property to display the unedited Live Photo’s photo content, or to provide still-image previews in your editing UI.



This image does not reflect the Live Photo’s orientation metadata. Adjust your rendering based on the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhotoEditingContext/orientation] property to ensure that the image appears to the user in the correct orientation.

## Examining an Editing Context’s Live Photo

- **duration**: The duration, in seconds, of the Live Photo.
- **photoTime**: The offset, in seconds, from the beginning of the Live Photo’s duration to the time corresponding to its still photo.
- **orientation**: The image orientation of the Live Photo.
